parameters.jsCode:
// Format executive report as branded HTML email const summary = $json.choices[0].message.content; const data = $('Aggregate Data').first().json; // Build agent performance table rows const agentRows = Object.entries(data.agentTotals).map(([agent, t]) => { const name = agent.replace('agent_', '').replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase()); return ` ${name} R${Math.round(t.revenueZar).toLocaleString()} ${Math.round(t.leadsGenerated)} ${Math.round(t.contentPublished)} ${t.avgSuccessRate}% `; }).join(''); const html = `

AVM Monthly Executive Report

${data.monthLabel}

R${Math.round(data.totalRevenue).toLocaleString()}
Revenue
${data.totalLeads}
Leads
${data.totalContent}
Content
${data.escalationCount}
Escalations

Agent Performance

${agentRows}
Agent Revenue Leads Content Success %

Executive Summary

${summary.replace(/\n/g, '
')}

Generated by AVM Intelligence Engine | INTEL-02 | ${data.kpiDataPoints} data points analyzed

`; return [{ json: { html, subject: 'AVM Monthly Executive Report - ' + data.monthLabel } }];

parameters.content:
## INTEL-02: Executive Report
Runs 1st of month 08:00 SAST.
Reads 30 days of KPIs + escalations + decisions.
AI generates executive summary.
Branded HTML email with performance table.
